result.name: Darning needle
result.description: Level: 1d6 Form: Needle with a large eye Effect: When activated, grows into a larger version of itself that acts as a medium weapon. It inflicts 4 points of damage and causes anything it successfully hits to shrink to half its size. The needle lasts for a number of hours equal to the cypher’s level.

sections.name: Darning needle
